display.purpose: Hero titles only. Powerful and rare.

title.purpose: Card titles, subsection heads, modal headers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Brass background with warm glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #EAB308; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.38); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #CA8A04; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.55); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #EAB308; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px -10px rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.3); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary outline action. Brass border, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #EAB308; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: calc(0.75rem - 2px) calc(1.5rem - 2px); border: 2px solid #EAB308; border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #EAB308; color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #EAB308; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Wine Button
components.description: Destructive or urgent action. Mulberry background.
components.css: .ds-btn-wine { background: #6E2A3E; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(110, 42, 62, 0.3); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-btn-wine:hover { background: #561F30; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(110, 42, 62, 0.45); } .ds-btn-wine:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #6E2A3E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with warm brass focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #FDFBF5; color: #1B1A2E; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #E5DDCB; border-radius: 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 100%; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #EAB308; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9C95A9; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; background: #F6F1E7; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Container for grouped content. Cream surface, subtle border.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content with description text goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FDFBF5; border: 1px solid #E5DDCB; border-radius: 1.5rem; overflow: hidden; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.35); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.25; color: #1B1A2E; margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #6F6883; margin: 0; }

components.name: Desktop Nav Link
components.html: HomeAboutMinistriesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); color: #6F6883; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); color: #1B1A2E; } .ds-nav-active { color: #EAB308; background: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.1); } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.15); }

narrative.overview:
This system is a sanctuary rendered in light. Warm brass glows against cool parchment and ink, like afternoon sun through amber glass falling on an old hymnbook. Every surface is tonal — depth comes from light washing across layers, not from hard shadows. The palette is liturgical jewel-tones: brass, mulberry wine, lilac, and slate-mauve over a warm cream ground.

The system explicitly rejects generic mega-church templates. There are no stock-photo hero sections, no corporate blues, no soulless gradients. The warmth is specific, local, and unmistakably Jamaican — felt in the brass light, the mulberry accents, and the unhurried typography.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth over shadow depth. Elevation is expressed through color washes and layer contrast, not drop shadows.
Refined interactions. Elements respond with subtlety: a gentle glow, a quiet lift, a slow underline draw. Nothing jumps.
Serif-forward identity. Fraunces carries all headings with its SOFT axis engaged.
Texture as atmosphere. Subtle grain overlays and radial gradient meshes suggest candlelight, never decoration.
Dark mode is night-sky indigo: the same brass warmth on a deeper, cooler ground.

rules.name: The Candlelight Rule
rules.body: Every color is chosen relative to its ground. Brass on cream is radiant; brass on midnight is ember-glow. No color is absolute — its character shifts with its container. Design across both modes; never check only one.

rules.name: The One-Size-Down Rule
rules.body: When in doubt about hierarchy, use the smaller size and let weight or color do the work. Bold body copy at 1rem beats regular at 1.125rem in every case.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interactive hover states. Resting elevation is expressed through tonal layer contrast alone.

dos: Do use Warm Brass as the primary interactive accent. It drives CTAs, navigation active states, and focus rings.
Do lead headings with Fraunces. Every section title and card heading should be in the display serif.
Do cap body text at 65-75 characters per line.
Do use tonal layering for depth: page to card to modal as increasingly light surfaces.
Do let the brass glow intensify on interactive hover states — it signals clickability.
Do show loading, empty, and error states for every data-driven section.
Do use Old Parchment as the background ground and Altar Cream for elevated surfaces.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Single solid color only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as colored accent).
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop blur on decorative surfaces).
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't default to modals. Exhaust inline and progressive disclosure first.
Don't use generic mega-church template patterns — stock photography, corporate gradients.
Don't use #000 or #fff. All neutrals are tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't over-animate. Refined, restrained interactions. No bounce, no elastic.
